arguments.expression: console.log('=== matchMedia Test ==='); try { console.log('window.matchMedia exists:', typeof window.matchMedia); if (window.matchMedia) { const mql = window.matchMedia('(max-width: 600px)'); console.log('MediaQueryList created:', !!mql); console.log('matches property:', mql.matches); console.log('media property:', mql.media); const mql2 = window.matchMedia('(min-width: 768px)'); console.log('min-width query matches:', mql2.matches); } else { console.log('❌ window.matchMedia not implemented'); } } catch (e) { console.log('❌ Error:', e.message); }
